history_text: 63-year-old male with a 17-year history of Type 2 diabetes mellitus, currently well-controlled (HbA1c 6.8%). Comorbidities include obesity. Renal function is mildly to moderately reduced (eGFR 45.9 mL/min/1.73m²). Current medications include Metformin 500mg twice daily, Empagliflozin 10mg once daily, Amlodipine 5mg once daily. No known drug allergies. He denies recent hospitalisations or surgical procedures.
